Class UnsafeCommandBuffer

Assembly
Unity.RenderPipelines.Core.Runtime.dll

Parameters

buffer GraphicsBuffer
data List<T>
managedBufferStartIndex int
graphicsBufferStartIndex int
count int

Type Parameters

T

buffer GraphicsBuffer
data NativeArray<T>

T

data NativeArray<T>

T
